data.title: Walmart raises pay for pharmacy technicians, offering $28/hour on average and up to $42/hour, adding 3,000 new roles.
data.description: Retail giant Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) is ramping up its commitment to health care services, particularly in the area of Health & Wellness. The company announced plans to enhance the roles of 3,000 pharmacy associates nationwide, transforming their positions into new pharmacy operations team lead roles. This move includes a significant increase in hourly wages, with an average pay of $28 per hour and a possibility of earning up to $42 per hour based on location and bonus eligibility. The aim is to provide more leadership opportunities and career paths within the pharmacy sector, allowing licensed professionals to dedicate more time to direct patient care. The initiative underscores Walmart's emphasis on expanding its health care investments.
